title: Aeshory 6 x 10ml Floral Essential Oils for Diffusers for Home, Aromatherapy, Skin Care, Scented Candle - Lavender, Rose, Jasmine, Cherry Blossom, White Tea, Ylang-Ylang
features: Floral Scents Collection: The AESHORY 6 x 10 ml floral essential oils set include Lavender, Rose, Jasmine, Cherry Blossom, White Tea, Ylang-Ylang. Each oil is perfectly selected and captures the romantic fragrance of a sunlit garden into your home.

Natural & Pure: These essential oils are made from premium global ingredients and are highly concentrated for a long-lasting, pleasant scent. No additives, no fillers and safe to use. Vegan with no animal testing.

Fresh Up Your Space; Add a few drops of our essential oils into your diffuser, humidifiers, aroma beads, car freshies and air freshener spray to fresh up your space. Ideal for stress relief, meditation, or creating a spa-like retreat.

DIY Homemade Products: Incorporate essential oils into DIY projects such as cream, scrubs, spray, body lotion, candle, soap, shower gel, bath bomb and more. Suitable for office, meeting room, study, or bedroom, living room, yoga centers, bathroom, SPA centers.

Essential Oils Gift Set: Packing in elegant box, it is an ideal gift for your family, friends and lovers in Birthdays, Anniversaries, Holidays,Father's days, Mother's days, Valentine’s days, Christmas and more.
